ci_support_linux_64_c_stdlib_version2.17:
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cuda_compiler:
- cuda-nvcc
cuda_compiler_version:
- '12.9'
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - cxx_compiler_version
  - c_stdlib_version
  - cuda_compiler_version

about.description:
libparallelproj builds and installs the parallelproj shared library (CPU/OpenMP or CUDA),
public headers, and a CMake package configuration for downstream CMake projects.
parallelproj-core is a Python extension module built with nanobind that provides a Python API for the parallelproj C++/CUDA library
about.summary: C++/CUDA backend projector library (parallelproj) and python API for tomographic reconstruction

build.script:
cmake -S "$SRC_DIR" -B "$SRC_DIR/_build_lib" -GNinja \
  ${CMAKE_ARGS} \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
  -DPROJECT_VERSION_OVERRIDE=${{ version }} \
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX="$PREFIX" \
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib \
  -DUSE_CUDA=${{ "ON" if cuda_compiler_version != "None" else "OFF" }} \
  -DBUILD_LIBRARY=ON \
  -DINSTALL_DEVEL=ON \
  -DBUILD_PYTHON=OFF \
  -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF \
  -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH="$PREFIX" \
  -DCMAKE_FIND_FRAMEWORK=NEVER \
  -DCMAKE_FIND_APPBUNDLE=NEVER
cmake --build "$SRC_DIR/_build_lib"
cmake --install "$SRC_DIR/_build_lib"

script: python -c "import parallelproj_core as m; print(m.__file__, ', cuda_enabled =', int(m.cuda_enabled))"
pytest -v ./tests

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  version: "2.0.3"
  build_number: 3
  python_min: "3.12"

recipe:
  name: libparallelproj-split
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/KUL-recon-lab/libparallelproj/archive/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: ef1b8bdc88c620df28c8f83951d7131f57d4fe24aa767e4461c90516e1fbfcdd

build:
  number: ${{ build_number }}

outputs:
  - package:
      name: libparallelproj

    build:
      string: ${{ ("cuda" ~ (cuda_compiler_version | version_to_buildstring)) if cuda_compiler_version != "None" else "cpu" }}_${{ hash }}_${{ build_number }}
      script:
        - if: win
          then: |
            cmake -S "%SRC_DIR%" -B "%SRC_DIR%/_build_lib" -GNinja ^
              %CMAKE_ARGS% ^
              -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release ^
              -DPROJECT_VERSION_OVERRIDE=${{ version }} ^
              -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX="%PREFIX%" ^
              -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib ^
              -DUSE_CUDA=${{ "ON" if cuda_compiler_version != "None" else "OFF" }} ^
              -DBUILD_LIBRARY=ON ^
              -DINSTALL_DEVEL=ON ^
              -DBUILD_PYTHON=OFF ^
              -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF ^
              -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH="%PREFIX%"
            cmake --build "%SRC_DIR%\_build_lib"
            cmake --install "%SRC_DIR%\_build_lib"
          else: |
            cmake -S "$SRC_DIR" -B "$SRC_DIR/_build_lib" -GNinja \
              ${CMAKE_ARGS} \
              -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
              -DPROJECT_VERSION_OVERRIDE=${{ version }} \
              -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX="$PREFIX" \
              -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib \
              -DUSE_CUDA=${{ "ON" if cuda_compiler_version != "None" else "OFF" }} \
              -DBUILD_LIBRARY=ON \
              -DINSTALL_DEVEL=ON \
              -DBUILD_PYTHON=OFF \
              -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF \
              -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH="$PREFIX" \
              -DCMAKE_FIND_FRAMEWORK=NEVER \
              -DCMAKE_FIND_APPBUNDLE=NEVER
            cmake --build "$SRC_DIR/_build_lib"
            cmake --install "$SRC_DIR/_build_lib"

      variant:
        use_keys:
          - cuda_compiler_version
        down_prioritize_variant: ${{ 0 if cuda_compiler_version != "None" else 1 }}

    requirements:
      build:
        - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
        - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
        - cmake
        - ninja
        - if: cuda_compiler_version != "None"
          then:
            - ${{ compiler('cuda') }}
      host:
        - if: osx
          then: llvm-openmp
        - if: cuda_compiler_version != "None"
          then:
            - cuda-version ==${{ cuda_compiler_version }}
      run:
        - if: osx
          then: llvm-openmp
        - if: cuda_compiler_version != "None"
          then:
            - __cuda
            - cuda-cudart
            
      run_exports:
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('libparallelproj', upper_bound='x.x') }}

    tests:
      - package_contents:
          files:
            exists:
              - if: win
                then: bin/parallelproj.dll
              - if: win
                then: lib/parallelproj.lib
              - if: linux
                then: lib/libparallelproj.so
              - if: osx
                then: lib/libparallelproj.dylib

              - lib/cmake/parallelproj/parallelprojConfig.cmake
              - lib/cmake/parallelproj/parallelprojConfigVersion.cmake
              - lib/cmake/parallelproj/parallelprojTargets.cmake

              - include/cuda_compat.h
              - include/cuda_utils.h
              - include/debug.h
              - include/parallelproj.h
              - include/parallelproj_export.h
              - include/utils.h

  - package:
      name: parallelproj-core

    build:
      skip: ${{ cuda_compiler_version != "None" }}
      python:
        version_independent: true
      script:
        - if: win
          then: |
            cmake -S "%SRC_DIR%" -B "%SRC_DIR%/_build_py" -GNinja ^
              %CMAKE_ARGS%^
              -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release ^
              -DPROJECT_VERSION_OVERRIDE=${{ version }} ^
              -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX="%PREFIX%" ^
              -DUSE_CUDA=OFF ^
              -DBUILD_LIBRARY=OFF ^
              -DINSTALL_DEVEL=OFF ^
              -DBUILD_PYTHON=ON ^
              -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF ^
              -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH="%PREFIX%" ^
              -DPython_EXECUTABLE="%PYTHON%" ^
              -DPython_ROOT_DIR="%PREFIX%"
            cmake --build "%SRC_DIR%\_build_py"
            cmake --install "%SRC_DIR%\_build_py"
          else: |
            cmake -S "$SRC_DIR" -B "$SRC_DIR/_build_py" -GNinja \
              ${CMAKE_ARGS} \
              -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
              -DPROJECT_VERSION_OVERRIDE=${{ version }} \
              -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX="$PREFIX" \
              -DUSE_CUDA=OFF \
              -DBUILD_LIBRARY=OFF \
              -DINSTALL_DEVEL=OFF \
              -DBUILD_PYTHON=ON \
              -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF \
              -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH="$PREFIX" \
              -DPython_EXECUTABLE="$PYTHON" \
              -DPython_ROOT_DIR="$PREFIX" \
              -DCMAKE_FIND_FRAMEWORK=NEVER \
              -DCMAKE_FIND_APPBUNDLE=NEVER
            cmake --build "$SRC_DIR/_build_py"
            cmake --install "$SRC_DIR/_build_py"

      files:
        - lib/python*/site-packages/parallelproj_core*.so
        - lib/python*/site-packages/parallelproj_core*.dylib
        - lib/site-packages/parallelproj_core*.pyd
        - lib/site-packages/parallelproj_core*.dll
        - Lib/site-packages/parallelproj_core*.pyd
        - Lib/site-packages/parallelproj_core*.dll

    requirements:
      build:
        - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
        - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
        - cmake
        - ninja
        - if: build_platform != target_platform
          then:
            - python ${{ python_min }}.*
            - python-abi3 ${{ python_min }}.*
            - cross-python_${{ target_platform }} ${{ python_min }}.*

      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
        - python-abi3 ${{ python_min }}.*
        - nanobind
        - libparallelproj

      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - python-abi3 >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage("libparallelproj", upper_bound="x.x") }}

    tests:
      - if: build_platform == host_platform
        then:
          script:
          - python -c "import parallelproj_core as m; print(m.__file__, ', cuda_enabled =', int(m.cuda_enabled))"
          - pytest -v ./tests

          requirements:
            run:
              - pytest
              - numpy
              - array-api-compat
              - array-api-strict
          files:
            source:
              - tests/**/*.py
              - tests/vstart.txt
              - tests/vend.txt
              - tests/img.txt
              - tests/expected_fwd_vals.txt

about:
  homepage: https://github.com/KUL-recon-lab/libparallelproj
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE
  documentation: https://libparallelproj.readthedocs.io
  repository: https://github.com/KUL-recon-lab/libparallelproj
  summary: C++/CUDA backend projector library (parallelproj) and python API for tomographic reconstruction
  description: |
    libparallelproj builds and installs the parallelproj shared library (CPU/OpenMP or CUDA),
    public headers, and a CMake package configuration for downstream CMake projects.
    parallelproj-core is a Python extension module built with nanobind that provides a Python API for the parallelproj C++/CUDA library

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - gschramm
  feedstock-name: libparallelproj
